title: NHRA Circular No. 33 of 2020 on Online CPD Activity Regulations
summary: Applies PDPL-linked confidentiality and personal data protection duties to online continuing professional development platforms and providers using digital meeting tools.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Requires online CPD providers to protect participant data.
theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: Online CPD provider rules including data protection obligations.
